epics.title: Engine
epics.description: The autonomous engine itself: budget tracking, board, boot/wrap-up flow, CI cron. Permanent epic — always improvable.

epics.title: Dashboard
epics.description: The realtime PM dashboard. Permanent epic — always improvable.

epics.title: Phone Decomposition
epics.description: Landing page where a phone explodes into its internal layers as you scroll — 3D layer separation with annotations.

epics.title: Neon Arcade Game
epics.description: A playable single-file neon-styled mini game with juice: particles, screenshake, sound via WebAudio.

epics.title: Generative Art Piece
epics.description: Interactive canvas artwork producing a unique composition every visit; seeded randomness, exportable as PNG.

tasks.title: Bootstrap engine scripts + state + skills
tasks.acceptance: track_tokens, budget_check, board, build_dashboard, server all run clean; skills defined; CLAUDE.md constitution in place.
tasks.handoff: engine scripts tested: verdicts, window roll, board, live api

tasks.title: Dashboard v1: gauge, kanban, gallery, journal, live polling
tasks.acceptance: server.py serves dashboard; /api/state returns live data; page renders gauge/kanban/gallery/journal and refreshes every 2s; verified with Chromium screenshot.
tasks.handoff: verified via chromium screenshot against live server

tasks.title: Build phone-decomposition landing page v1
tasks.acceptance: projects/phone-decompose/index.html: scroll drives the phone apart into >=5 labeled 3D layers and back; smooth on Chromium; screenshot saved.
tasks.handoff: v1 verified at p=0,0.5,0.99 desktop + 390px mobile; ?p= test hook added

tasks.title: GitHub Actions hourly cron with budget preflight
tasks.acceptance: .github/workflows/engine.yml exists; preflight gate tested locally in spent and available states; README documents CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN setup.
tasks.handoff: preflight tested both states; README documents secret setup

tasks.title: Phone page v2: polish (lighting, copy, mobile)
tasks.acceptance: Layer shading/gradients feel 3D; annotation copy is fun; works at 390px width.

tasks.title: Design + build neon arcade game v1
tasks.acceptance: Playable game loop with score, game-over, restart; neon glow aesthetic; juice (particles or screenshake); single file.
tasks.handoff: verified via drive.py: collect/score/death/restart all fire; demo=1 autopilot + title telemetry

tasks.title: Build generative art piece v1
tasks.acceptance: Canvas artwork, new seeded composition per visit, click regenerates, S key saves PNG; single file.
tasks.handoff: seeds 7 and 42424242 produce distinct compositions; frame telemetry via title; click/S handlers in place

tasks.title: Dashboard v2: per-project token cost + usage sparkline
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard shows weighted tokens spent per epic and a window-usage sparkline from history.

tasks.title: First retro: write learnings, file improvement tasks
tasks.acceptance: state/learnings.md has >=3 concrete lessons with token costs; >=2 new improvement tasks filed.
tasks.handoff: 3 lessons with token costs; T10+T11 filed

tasks.title: board.py brief: one-command boot context (queue+handoffs+budget, <30 lines)
tasks.acceptance: boot skill reads a single command output instead of two JSON files; measurably fewer boot tokens
tasks.handoff: brief tested; boot skill now uses it

tasks.title: journal.py: script to append session entries to sessions.json
tasks.acceptance: wrap-up no longer hand-edits JSON; one CLI call appends ended/did/stopped_because/resume_with
tasks.handoff: journal.py start/end tested; wrap-up skill updated

tasks.title: Cross-platform engine: browser + python detection for Windows/local runs
tasks.acceptance: engine scripts and skills work on Windows (chrome.exe path, python vs python3); documented in CLAUDE.md env notes; verified by running server + a screenshot locally.

tasks.title: Dashboard: add-task form - queue a task from the UI, associate to an existing epic or create a new project epic
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard shows an Add Task form: title, size S/M, epic dropdown listing existing epics plus 'new project' (asks title+slug). server.py POST /api/task validates and writes it via board logic, placing it at a chosen queue position (default top). New task appears on the kanban within one refresh. Verified end-to-end in a real browser.
tasks.handoff: POST /api/task verified both paths (existing epic top-of-queue, new epic); form screenshot-verified in Chrome

tasks.title: dashboard imporvement
tasks.acceptance: should allow me to drag tasks, open them, check the status. If not me, you should by yourself priorityse most important things.  also it should allow me to show the status, the merge request if one done etc
tasks.handoff: Board now supports drag-to-move (status) + drag-to-reorder (next priority), click-to-open task modal with editable status/handoff/PR link, and PR links on cards. New POST /api/task/update endpoint + board.update_task().

tasks.title: engine is not working auotmosly
tasks.acceptance: when tokens available, app should invest all the token for new tasks, on self imporvement and on new projects
tasks.handoff: autopilot.py (headless-agent loop, budget-gated, naps to reset) + heartbeat.py + dashboard Agents panel; dry-run + panel verified

queue.note: Order of `next` is priority. board.py keeps this in sync with backlog.json statuses.

projects.title: Phone Decomposition
projects.description: Landing page where a phone explodes into its internal layers as you scroll — 3D layer separation with annotations.

projects.title: Neon Arcade Game
projects.description: A playable single-file neon-styled mini game with juice: particles, screenshake, sound via WebAudio.

projects.title: Generative Art Piece
projects.description: Interactive canvas artwork producing a unique composition every visit; seeded randomness, exportable as PNG.

sessions.did: Bootstrap: constitution, state system, engine scripts (track/budget/board/dashboard/server/drive), 5 skills, realtime dashboard, CI cron, and 3 shipped projects (phone teardown, NEON DRIFT game, Silk Fields art). T1-T4, T6, T7, T9, T10 done.
sessions.resume_with: python3 engine/board.py brief — T11 (journal.py) is top of queue

sessions.did: Migration: session moved from cloud container to local Windows machine; cloud commits were unreachable, so all files were restored from conversation context and pushed to github.com/metasito/creativeworld. Filed T12 (cross-platform support).
sessions.resume_with: python engine/board.py brief — T11 top of queue; note Windows env (python, chrome.exe)

sessions.did: Work session: T11 journal.py, then T13 dashboard add-task form (user prio 1)

learnings: 2026-07-14: Cloud-container work is unreachable once a session moves machines — push to a remote EARLY; a repo without a remote is one container-reclaim away from losing everything.

2026-07-14: Virtual-time screenshots lie for rAF pages — use `engine/drive.py` (real-time WebDriver; needs chromedriver `--disable-build-check` with the bundled Chromium, and `--no-sandbox --disable-gpu` everywhere).

2026-07-14: URL test hooks are gold: `?p=` (pin scroll progress), `?demo=1` (autopilot + state mirrored into document.title), `?seed=` (deterministic art) make every project verifiable headlessly for pennies.
2026-07-14: Cost calibration — full bootstrap (engine + dashboard + 3 shipped projects) ≈ 1.23M weighted tokens; one M-sized single-file project ≈ 150–250k; an S task ≈ 40–80k.

2026-07-14 (bootstrap): Transcript JSONL at `~/.claude/projects/<proj>/<session>.jsonl` carries per-turn `usage`; weighted formula in tokens.json config approximates plan units — calibrate, don't trust.

log.msg: T15 shipped: autopilot + heartbeat + live agent panel
